name: Tla School Bus Co Inc

name: Northstar Bus
principals: unknown (multiple FMCSA 'Northstar' carriers exist; specific principal at 9804 Ditmas Ave not disclosed publicly)
fleet_size_est: ~15-25 (inferred from 40 employees; BBB-listed staff range 10-19 conflicts with Summit data showing 40)
districts_or_customers: NYC DOE / private school routes (Brooklyn-based small operator); possibly OPT (NYC Office of Pupil Transportation) subcontractor — not directly confirmed

fit_notes: Small Brooklyn-based operator in Summit's NY footprint; NYC OPT contractors are typically attractive consolidation targets given union/route stability, but Northstar Bus is sub-scale (~$1.5M revenue) and would be a true micro tuck-in. Confirm DOE contract status before pursuing.

name: Central PA Honor Bus Inc
owner_or_parent: independent (Non-Profit / Non-Stock entity per PA Dept of State, entity ID 4187432)
fleet_size_est: unknown — likely 1-2 motorcoaches, NOT a school bus fleet
districts_or_customers: Almost certainly affiliated with Honor Flight Network / Central PA Honor Flight — transports WWII/Korea/Vietnam veterans to DC memorials; NOT a school district contractor
recent_news: Related Central PA Honor Flight launched first veterans trip Sept 2025; this entity registered as PA non-profit 2013, address changed 2016
fit_notes: DISQUALIFIED as tuck-in target. Registered as Non-Profit / Non-Stock in PA — almost certainly a veterans charity-related entity (Honor Flight bus), not a private school bus contractor. Employee/revenue figures in source data appear to be a mis-tag. Do not pursue.

name: Pocono Express Bus Co
succession_signal: medium (single female owner-operator at residential Tobyhanna address; small scale suggests potential succession question, but no public confirmation of age/transition signals)
districts_or_customers: Likely Pocono Mountain SD area subcontract or private route work; Pocono Mountain SD primary contract is held by First Student, so Pocono Express is most plausibly a sub/spot contractor or services private/parochial/SPED routes
recent_news: No public M&A or news found
fit_notes: True micro operator at a residential address in Tobyhanna; named female owner is a positive succession signal. However, Pocono Mountain SD is locked up by First Student, limiting strategic value. Possible niche SPED/private-school book of business — worth a low-priority outreach call to confirm contracts and succession interest.

name: Briarcliff Bus Co Inc
owner_or_parent: independent (Borho family; founded by Joe Borho, currently owned by George Borho)
succession_signal: medium-high (2nd-generation family ownership, 50+ year-old business, founder generation transitioned; current owner may face own succession question)
districts_or_customers: Ossining / Briarcliff Manor area school districts in Westchester County, NY (Ossining UFSD, Briarcliff Manor UFSD likely); Satisfactory FMCSA safety rating since 2012 compliance review
recent_news: No M&A news identified; MCS-150 refiled 3/24/2026, indicating active operations; 'Satisfactory' FMCSA safety rating maintained; 0 out-of-service violations and 0 crashes over trailing 24 months
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate: 54-year-old 2nd-generation family business with 44 buses, clean FMCSA safety record, anchored in affluent lower Westchester (Ossining/Briarcliff Manor) which is core Summit NY territory. Named owner George Borho and multi-generational history create a clear succession narrative. Recommend prioritized outreach.
